name: Submit PointConditionalOffer successfully

steps.name: Given the Submit PointConditionalOffer API is available
When I submit a Conditional offer using "PointConditionalOffer.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should contain offerCode
And the response status should be "LoadedToCampaign"

fullName: Submit PointConditionalOffer Offer API: Submit PointConditionalOffer successfully
